situation_summary: Major data sync failure during client demo caused significant embarrassment. Support response times were critically slow — 14+ day resolution on P1 tickets. Account was actively considering switching to a competitor.
risk_signals: data sync failure during live client demo
CSM not notified of incident proactively
low login activity for 3 consecutive weeks
action_taken: Executive Business Review with dedicated support engineer assigned to account. Real-time data sync health monitoring implemented. Weekly personal account review by CSM established.
outcome: Renewed with 20% ARR expansion — Ahmedabad office added. New API integration proposal accepted.
csm_notes: EBR was critical but so was the personal accountability. Harish needed to see genuine ownership from our side. Dedicated support engineer (Ramesh) became the hero of this story. Early proactive monitoring setup was the turning point.
